issues.description: deliverable_c_expiring has no DSN/live command path. pncp_supplier_contracts / datalake_helper.supplier_contracts not consumed. Cannot produce real expiring-contract list from PostgreSQL until wired + data with vigencia present.
issues.recommendation: Follow-up: add live/from-dsn command mapping supplier_contracts (vigencia_fim + aditivos if available) into select_expiring candidates; keep fail-closed when empty (EMPTY, no silent invent).

issues.description: DoD text requires contracts 'compatíveis com o perfil'; implementation stamps profile_id/version but does not filter by profile work types, bands, or region.
issues.recommendation: Either apply profile filters when loading candidates, or document that profile stamp is provenance only until live path enforces compatibility.

issues.description: audit_report aditivos_update check is always PASS due to `or True`. Unit tests still prove aditivo application.
issues.recommendation: Tighten audit: require any(aditivos_aplicados) when report claims aditivo capability on non-empty fixture path, or separate capability flag without rubber stamp.

residual_risks: Live path not wired to DSN — mechanism proven on fixture only; real expiring list requires datalake wiring + contracts with vigencia/source/verification
Profile compatibility is stamp-only, not filter
Audit aditivos check is weakly formulated (or True)
Fixture orgs/CNPJs are synthetic (schema proof), not live market contracts

may_flip_dod_conditions: PO accepts residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED (mechanism claim, not live expiring-market population claim)
Flip narrative must state fixture/schema proof + fail-closed rules; must NOT claim live SC contracts vincendos from PG
Optional: keep L222 open until live path if PO wants operational list before [x]
gate_decision.reason: All 9 DoD C audit checks PASS on fixture; missing vigencia / out-of-window / missing source excluded; no fabricated relicitation %; aditivos update effective end; CONTRATUAL vs ESTIMADO labeled; confidence+limitations present; tests map 1:1; process order correct (DoD unchecked, qa_verdict PENDING before independent QA). Residuals (live DSN, profile filter, weak audit or True) are documented honesty debt, not AC failures of the mechanism slice.
gate_decision.po_guidance: Authorized to flip L222-230 with residual narrative OR defer flip until live path. Do not claim live expiring contracts from empty DSN. QA did not flip DoD.
gate_decision.recommended_dod_action: PO decision: flip with residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED note, or leave open until DSN path ships
